chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-4130 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Fresh Case 1. For orders on Misc. No.16973 of 2025 (Urgent) 2. For orders on office objection No.1 to 8. 3. For orders on Misc. No.16974 of 2025 (exemption) 4. For hearing of main case. 19.08.2025 M/s. Saddam Hussain and Sajid Ali Lakho, Advocates for the petitioner. *************** 1. Urgency granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Exemption is allowed subject to all just exceptions. 4 It is stated by the learned counsel for the petitioner that the petitioner is presently in Dubai UAE and has filed the instant petition through his attorney Izhar Hussain son of Nisar Ahmed, seeking protective/transitory bail in FIR No.79 of 2024 under Section 489-F PPC registered at Police Station Cantt, Hyderabad on the ground that his name has been mentioned in the FIR; therefore, he has filed this petition seeking protection from arrest, while returning to Pakistan, at Jinnah Airport, Karachi to surrender before the learned trial Court. Without touching the merits of the case, the petitioner, Humayun Barkat son of Inayatullah admitted to protective/transitory bail for a period of 10 [Ten] days from today subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.100,000/- (Rupees One Hundred Thousand Only) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. This concession of bail shall remain operative only for ten days from today viz. 2 19.08.2025 and shall cease to exist on 28.08.2025 or before it when the petitioner surrenders before the trial Court, whichever is earlier. Instant petition stands disposed of in the above terms.

This concession of bail shall remain operative only for ten days from today viz. 2 19.08.2025 and shall cease to exist on 28.08.2025 or before it when the petitioner surrenders before the trial Court, whichever is earlier. Instant petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Hyder/PS
